## Problem

<!-- Describe the user-visible or repository contract that needs to change. -->

## Failing contract or evidence

<!-- Include the pre-change failing test, command output, or smallest reproducible evidence. -->

## Change

<!-- Explain the scoped implementation and why it resolves the problem. -->

## Verification commands and results

<!-- List every command run and its result. Do not write "tests pass" without output. -->

## Generated-course evidence

<!-- Link or summarize generated fixture evidence. Write "Not applicable" with a reason when no generated course changes. -->

## Security, compatibility, and migration implications

<!-- Cover trust boundaries, supported platforms, version compatibility, and migration needs. Write "None" only after checking each area. -->
